response:
I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription, possessing a strong understanding of medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I have excellent interpersonal skills, a strong team spirit, and a willingness to learn and develop new competencies. I am reliable, dependable, and often seek new responsibilities within diverse employment settings. I excel at supervising, transcribing, and managing customer relationships, consistently exceeding productivity to support organizational success.  

Experience includes roles such as medical scribe and editor at V Transcriptions LLC, S10 Healthcare Solutions, and other healthcare organizations, where I maintained high-quality output and adhered to strict turnaround times. I have also held supervisory roles in a glass manufacturing company, managing a team and enhancing customer service processes. My background in quality assurance and continuous improvement has further strengthened my ability to ensure accuracy and efficiency in medical transcription.  

I am passionate about my work and committed to delivering exceptional service while fostering a positive and collaborative work environment. I am fluent in Word, Excel, and Outlook, and capable of working with electronic health records. I am an adaptable and computer-savvy professional with a strong drive to contribute to the advancement of healthcare communication.  

Nationality: Indian. Visa: On Visit.
